CustomField.description: For use with Lottery Reporting TASK0198615. This is the calculation details for that application level, but calculated with this year's data. This field tells us why the donor didn't get the same applications this year as last year.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This is the calculation details for that application level, but calculated with this year's data. This field tells us why the donor didn't get the same applications this year as last year.
CustomField.label: Prior Year Lottery Application Audit
